author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Revised plan: implement the StrongWolfe line search that effective_max_eval was scaffolded for. Add step_with_closure() to Lbfgs that takes a closure for function re-evaluation, implement Nocedal & Wright Algorithm 3.5/3.6 (line search + zoom). The existing step() stays as fixed-step mode. Fix the other two warnings (move test-only imports, remove genuinely unused import).
